title: How do I change my faculty/staff username?
plain_text: All Northeastern University faculty/staff account usernames are generated from the official name provided by Human Resources (HR). Your username can only be changed in a limited number of circumstances. If you have requested a name change through Workday and would like your username to reflect that change. If your assigned username resulted in a vulgar or offensive term. Note: Some faculty/staff, such as students on co-op, don't have access to change their name in Workday. Refer to Updating Personal Information for more information. Change legal, preferred, or chosen name Submit a request to change your legal, preferred, and/or chosen name on Workday by following the instructions provided by the HR Service Center. Wait 48 hours after your records have been updated by HR to contact the IT Service Desk at 617.373.4357 or help@northeastern.edu .
body_html:
All Northeastern University faculty/staff account usernames are generated from the official name provided by Human Resources (HR). Your username can only be changed in a limited number of circumstances.
  • If you have requested a name change through Workday and would like your username to reflect that change.
  • If your assigned username resulted in a vulgar or offensive term. Note: Some faculty/staff, such as students on co-op, don't have access to change their name in Workday. Refer to Updating Personal Information for more information.

Change legal, preferred, or chosen name

  • Submit a request to change your legal, preferred, and/or chosen name on Workday by following the instructions provided by the HR Service Center.
  • Wait 48 hours after your records have been updated by HR to contact the IT Service Desk at 617.373.4357 or help@northeastern.edu.
